title: Nightgauge Configuration
description: Schema for .nightgauge/config.yaml — the Nightgauge pipeline configuration file.

owner.description: GitHub organization or user that owns the repository.

fields.description: Project board field IDs and option IDs.

admin_merge.description: Use --admin flag on merge (requires admin permissions). Set false to respect branch protection.

max_concurrent.description: Maximum concurrent pipeline runs. Single source of truth for both drag-to-pipeline and autonomous-mode dispatch. The legacy autonomous.max_concurrent key is deprecated and only honored as a fallback when this is unset.

context_schema_repair.description: Context schema self-correction: re-invoke stages when context file fails Zod validation. Appends error-fix instructions to the original SKILL.md prompt. Each repair attempt consumes tokens (~same cost as a stage run). Issue #2552.

enabled.description: Enable context schema repair. When true, stages are re-invoked with Zod error details if their context file fails validation.

max_attempts.description: Maximum repair attempts per stage per pipeline run. Range: 0-5.

model_routing.description: AI model routing configuration. Automatic complexity routing caps at Opus; the premium Fable tier (claude-fable-5, ~2x Opus cost) is never auto-selected and is reachable only via an explicit minimum_model of 'fable', the 'frontier' performance mode, or a per-run model override.

minimum_model.description: Minimum model per pipeline stage (tiers: haiku < sonnet < opus < fable). Setting a stage floor of 'fable' opts that stage into the premium frontier tier.

orchestration.description: Multi-agent orchestration knobs (epic #3899). Off by default — the WorkflowEngine is opt-in while the epic lands. Budget/agent/concurrency caps use 0 as the 'uncapped / use provider ceiling' sentinel.

disabled.description: Disable the orchestration engine entirely. The CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_WORKFLOWS environment variable forces this on regardless of config.

prefer_native_offload.description: Per-stage preference for an adapter's native runWorkflow() offload over the portable SdkFanoutRunner floor when the adapter declares native-workflow. pr-create/pr-merge are single-agent and never fanned out.

max_usd.description: Total USD budget cap for a single orchestrated run. 0 = uncapped.

max_agents.description: Max agents spawned over a whole run. 0 = use the provider safety ceiling; > 0 can only lower it.

max_concurrency.description: Max agents running at once. 0 = use the provider safety ceiling; > 0 can only lower it.

trusted_stages.description: Stages that run without approval prompts.

features_config.description: Path to audit features config YAML.

repos.description: Repositories to include in audit scope.

issue_threshold.description: Minimum friction occurrences before creating an issue.

retention_days.description: Delete assessment records older than this many days.

autonomous_discovery.description: Autonomous self-improvement discovery configuration. Controls scheduled release-watch and continuous-improvement runs.

enabled.description: Master switch for autonomous discovery. Set false to disable all scheduled runs.

kill_switch.description: Kill switch: when true, monitoring continues but no GitHub issues are created. Use to pause issue creation without disabling infrastructure.

score_threshold.description: Minimum relevance score (0-100) to auto-create a GitHub issue. Changes below this threshold go to the backlog instead.

auto_created_label.description: Comma-separated labels applied to auto-created issues.

discovery_budget.description: Token budget for scheduled discovery runs (separate from main pipeline budget).

release_watch_max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens per release-watch assessment run. null = no limit.

continuous_improvement_max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens per continuous-improvement run. null = no limit.

scheduled_tasks.description: Scheduled task definitions (informational). Execution is driven by GitHub Actions workflows.

release_watch.description: Release-watch daily detection and assessment task.
